sentences.english: I always check reviews before buying anything online.
sentences.korean: 온라인으로 뭘 사기 전에 항상 리뷰를 확인해요.

sentences.english: If it has less than four stars, I won't buy it.
I don't trust online reviews anymore because too many of them are fake.
sentences.korean: 온라인 리뷰를 더 이상 안 믿어요.

sentences.english: I prefer asking friends for recommendations.
sentences.korean: 가짜가 너무 많아서요. 친구에게 추천을 물어보는 게 나아요.

sentences.english: I always leave reviews after a good experience, because I want to support small businesses.
sentences.korean: 좋은 경험 후에 항상 리뷰를 남겨요. 작은 사업체를 지지하고 싶어서요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
